languages.text: "Завершение жизненного цикла Оптикона-22 прошло в высшей степени достойным образом, я не могу этого отрицать". {n}Манипулус слегка кивает.{/n} "Однако же смерть, пусть и достойная, несет с собой печаль. Почтим же память павшего гальваническим гимном". {n}Вокс Эоганна проигрывает торжественно-скорбную двоичную мелодию.{/n}

"The termination of Opticon-22's life cycle was executed in a most dignified manner, I cannot deny it." {n}The Manipulus gives a slight nod.{/n} "Nevertheless, death, however noble, carries grief in its wake. Let us honour the memory of the fallen with a galvanic hymn." {n}Eogunn's vox emits a solemn, mournful binharic chime.{/n}

Почтим же память павшего гальваническим гимном". {n}Вокс Эоганна проигрывает торжественно-скорбную двоичную мелодию.{/n}

Let us honour the memory of the fallen with a galvanic hymn." {n}Eogunn's vox emits a solemn, mournful binharic chime.{/n}

languages.text: «La finalización del ciclo vital de Opticon-22 fue ejecutada con dignidad, no puedo negarlo». {n}El manipulus asiente ligeramente.{/n} «Sin embargo, la muerte, por noble que sea, conlleva pesar. Honremos el recuerdo de los caídos con un himno galvánico». {n}El voco de Eogunn emite un tintineo binario lastimero.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The termination of Opticon-22's life cycle was executed in a most dignified manner, I cannot deny it." {n}The Manipulus gives a slight nod.{/n} "Nevertheless, death, however noble, carries grief in its wake. Honremos el recuerdo de los caídos con un himno galvánico». {n}El voco de Eogunn emite un tintineo binario lastimero.{/n}

languages.text: “不得不承认，奥普蒂孔22号生命周期以极为庄严的方式画上了句号。”{n}操纵者微微点头。{/n}“然而，无论死亡有多么崇高，它终究会带来悲伤。就让我们用一首流电赞美诗，来纪念逝者的英灵吧。”{n}伊奥贡的音阵随即发出庄严而哀伤的二进制圣咏。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The termination of Opticon-22's life cycle was executed in a most dignified manner, I cannot deny it." {n}The Manipulus gives a slight nod.{/n} "Nevertheless, death, however noble, carries grief in its wake. Let us honour the memory of the fallen with a galvanic hymn." {n}Eogunn's vox emits a solemn, mournful binharic chime.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Terminierung des Lebenszyklus von Opticon-22 ist ausgesprochen würdevoll erfolgt, das kann ich nicht bestreiten." {n}Der Manipulus nickt unmerklich.{/n} "Dennoch bringt auch ein edler Tod Leid mit sich. Lasst uns die Gefallenen mit einer galvanischen Hymne ehren." {n}Aus Eogunns Vox ertönt eine gleichsam feierliche wie traurige binhärische Melodie.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The termination of Opticon-22's life cycle was executed in a most dignified manner, I cannot deny it." {n}The Manipulus gives a slight nod.{/n} "Nevertheless, death, however noble, carries grief in its wake. Let us honour the memory of the fallen with a galvanic hymn." {n}Eogunn's vox emits a solemn, mournful binharic chime.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Die Terminierung des Lebenszyklus von Opticon-22 ist ausgesprochen würdevoll erfolgt, das kann ich nicht bestreiten." {n}Der Manipulus nickt unmerklich.{/n} "Dennoch bringt auch ein edler Tod Leid mit sich. Lasst uns die Gefallenen mit einer galvanischen Hymne ehren." {n}Aus Eogunns Vox ertönt eine gleichsam feierliche wie traurige binhärische Melodie.{/n}

languages.text: « La cessation du cycle vital d'Opticon-22 a été exécutée de la manière la plus honorable qui soit, c'est indéniable, {n}déclare le manipulus avec un léger hochement de tête.{/n} Pour autant, la mort, si noble soit-elle, porte le chagrin dans son sillage. Rendons hommage à la mémoire du défunt avec un hymne galvanique. » {n}La voix d'Eogunn émet un carillon binhaire empreint de chagrin et de solennité.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The termination of Opticon-22's life cycle was executed in a most dignified manner, I cannot deny it." {n}The Manipulus gives a slight nod.{/n} "Nevertheless, death, however noble, carries grief in its wake. Let us honour the memory of the fallen with a galvanic hymn." {n}Eogunn's vox emits a solemn, mournful binharic chime.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « La cessation du cycle vital d'Opticon-22 a été exécutée de la manière la plus honorable qui soit, c'est indéniable, {n}déclare le manipulus avec un léger hochement de tête.{/n} Pour autant, la mort, si noble soit-elle, porte le chagrin dans son sillage. Rendons hommage à la mémoire du défunt avec un hymne galvanique. » {n}La voix d'Eogunn émet un carillon binhaire empreint de chagrin et de solennité.{/n}

languages.text: "Opticon-22'nin yaşam döngüsünün sonlandırılması son derece onurlu bir şekilde gerçekleştirildi, bunu inkâr edemem." {n}Manipülus hafifçe başını sallıyor.{/n} "Yine de ölüm, ne kadar asil olursa olsun peşinden keder getirir. Düşenlerin anısını galvaniz bir ilahiyle onurlandıralım." {n}Eogunn'un voksundan ağırbaşlı, kederli bir ikilidil tını yükseliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The termination of Opticon-22's life cycle was executed in a most dignified manner, I cannot deny it." {n}The Manipulus gives a slight nod.{/n} "Nevertheless, death, however noble, carries grief in its wake. Let us honour the memory of the fallen with a galvanic hymn." {n}Eogunn's vox emits a solemn, mournful binharic chime.{/n}

Düşenlerin anısını galvaniz bir ilahiyle onurlandıralım." {n}Eogunn'un voksundan ağırbaşlı, kederli bir ikilidil tını yükseliyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「オプティコン22のライフサイクルの終了は、最も尊厳ある方法で行われました。それは否定できません。」{n}マニピュラスがわずかに首を振る。{/n}「それでも、どんなに尊い死であっても、悲しみは必ず引きづいてきます。故人を偲ぶために、電磁音の賛歌を奏でましょう。」{n}エオグンンのボイスから、厳粛で哀悼の意を込めた二音の鐘が鳴り響く。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The termination of Opticon-22's life cycle was executed in a most dignified manner, I cannot deny it." {n}The Manipulus gives a slight nod.{/n} "Nevertheless, death, however noble, carries grief in its wake.
